entry.title: FileGuard - File Hash Checker
entry.content:
🔐 FileGuard - File Hash Checker

A simple shell script tool to generate file hashes and verify file integrity.

📌 About

File Hash Checker is a lightweight and easy-to-use tool that allows users to:

🔍 Generate file hashes using MD5, SHA1, or SHA256.
✅ Verify file integrity by comparing the hash of the original and copied files.

🚀 Features

📜 Menu-based interface for easy navigation.
🔄 Supports multiple hashing algorithms: MD5, SHA1, SHA256.
⚠️ Error handling for missing files and invalid inputs.

🛠 Installation

Clone the repository and give the script execution permissions:

🏃 Usage

Run the script:

Follow the menu options to generate hashes or verify file integrity.

🖼️ Screenshots

Here are some screenshots of the tool in action:

🔢 Generating a file hash:

🔍 Verifying file integrity:

👤 Author

  • Developed by Gaurav N Jain

📧 Contact: LinkedIn Profile
Github Repo: link

entry.title: Welcome to my Portfolio
entry.content:
Welcome to my cybersecurity portfolio and blog. This site features writeups from various CTFs, security research projects, and my personal notes.

The content here is automatically synchronized from my GitHub repositories every 6 hours.

Use the navigation menu above to explore my Articles and Categories.
